phaseName: Inspect state dict and dataset, recover architecture
goal: Understand /app/weights.pt structure (keys, shapes, dtypes) and /app/dataset.pt structure, then derive the RecoveredModel architecture that exactly matches the state dict.
summary: Phase 1 complete. Inspected /app/weights.pt (1,252,800 float32 params; embedding Linear(64→128), pos_encoder pe buffer (1,5000,128), transformer_encoder 3 layers + transformer_decoder 1 layer with d_model=128/dim_feedforward=256/nhead=8, output_layer Linear(128→64)) and /app/dataset.pt (dict with src_sequences and tgt_sequences, both (20,20,64)). Wrote /app/recovered_model.py with PositionalEncoding (pe as persistent buffer) and RecoveredModel (forward takes src, tgt). Strict load_state_dict succeeds with zero missing/unexpected keys. Baseline MSE on the dataset using original weights = 1.5510306358337402, saved to docs/step3-baseline-mse.txt.
stepSummaries:
1. Load /app/weights.pt, print all keys, shapes, dtypes, and total param count. Load /app/dataset.pt, inspect its type/shape (tuple/list/dict/tensor) and identify input/output tensor shapes. [verified]
  2. Write /app/recovered_model.py defining class RecoveredModel that exactly matches the implied architecture (Linear stack matching param shapes), plus a torch.utils.checkpoint-safe forward that returns the model output. Construct the model, call load_state_dict with strict=True on /app/weights.pt, and assert success. [verified]
  3. Compute and record the baseline MSE loss of the recovered model with original weights on /app/dataset.pt. Save the baseline number for later comparison. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps use real verification: state-dict inspection (smoke for the inspection itself), strict load_state_dict (a real state-dict equality test, not a grep), and live model inference to compute baseline MSE.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 2 verify: `OK 612800` (612800 trainable + 640000 pe buffer = 1,252,800 strict load); step 3 verify: `baseline_mse= 1.5510306358337402` from a real forward pass.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to inspect the artifacts and recover the architecture with a baseline MSE. /app/recovered_model.py exists and strict-loads weights.pt; baseline MSE recorded.
gateVerdicts.evidence: /app/recovered_model.py created; load_state_dict(strict=True) prints OK; baseline MSE 1.5510306358337402 written to docs/step3-baseline-mse.txt.

gateVerdicts.rationale: No deferred items: all three planned sub-tasks were completed and verified.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All 3/3 phase-1 steps are terminal with completed status.
